Headline: #66 Chicago and #82 Kimball/Homan  Temporary Reroute near Chicago/Homan
ShortDescription: #66 Chicago and #82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Chicago/Homan due to police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#66 Chicago and #82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Chicago/Homan due to police activity.

#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Chicago, Kedzie, Augusta, Hamlin, Chicago and over normal route. 

#82 Kimball/Homan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions:

Southbound #82 Kimball/Homan buses will operate via Homan, Augusta, Hamlin, Ferdinand, Homan and over normal route.

Northbound #82 Kimball/Homan buses will operate via Homan, Franklin, Hamlin, Augusta, Homan and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.
